whistleblower_flags.flag: Index stale, agents blind — active harm possible.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "CEO budget allocation", "issue": "Operating at $100/month creates hard infrastructure ceilings. At 10x users, Postgres RDS will exhaust memory on analytics queries, Supabase function timeouts will spike, and API latency will breach 2s baseline. No buffer for incident response or scaling bursts.", "recommended_fix": "Pre-negotiate scaling triggers with AWS/Supabase. Allocate 30% of next month's budget to reserved RDS instances and connection pooling. Map database growth against user count now, not at crisis."}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "swarm/agents/", "issue": "Swarm architecture expects 13 active perspectives, but directory is empty. At scale, failure in one agent will cascade — no isolation, no fallback. System treats swarm as functional when it's symbolic.", "recommended_fix": "Implement at least 3 core agents (Security, QA, Needs) as independent runtimes with health checks. Decouple from Atlas' execution thread. Test failure isolation before user growth."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Operating at $100/month creates hard infrastructure ceilings. At 10x users, Postgres RDS will exhaust memory on analytics queries, Supabase function timeouts will spike, and API latency will breach 2s baseline. No buffer for incident response or scaling bursts.
findings.recommended_fix: Pre-negotiate scaling triggers with AWS/Supabase. Allocate 30% of next month's budget to reserved RDS instances and connection pooling. Map database growth against user count now, not at crisis.

findings.issue: Swarm architecture expects 13 active perspectives, but directory is empty. At scale, failure in one agent will cascade — no isolation, no fallback. System treats swarm as functional when it's symbolic.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement at least 3 core agents (Security, QA, Needs) as independent runtimes with health checks. Decouple from Atlas' execution thread. Test failure isolation before user growth.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Security", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "CEO's request for self-assessment bypasses documented swarm protocol in `packages/swarm/autonomous_run.py`. No Coordinator Agent exists to validate if this task complies with Level 0 laws before execution. Class 3 (solo execution) risk elevated — perspective acting without swarm consensus.", "recommended_fix": "Halt execution until Coordinator Agent is built and runs protocol alignment check. All CEO requests must flow through swarm consensus mechanism, not direct assignment to single perspective."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/identity.md", "issue": "Task creates self-referential loop: Security Auditor evaluating CEO who defines the Constitution that governs the Auditor. No independent arbiter exists if CEO violates own laws. Power concentration == single point of failure.", "recommended_fix": "Introduce external ethics validator with immutable veto on Constitution violations. Current design allows CEO to waive any rule, including those protecting users from harm."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: CEO's request for self-assessment bypasses documented swarm protocol in `packages/swarm/autonomous_run.py`. No Coordinator Agent exists to validate if this task complies with Level 0 laws before execution. Class 3 (solo execution) risk elevated — perspective acting without swarm consensus.
findings.recommended_fix: Halt execution until Coordinator Agent is built and runs protocol alignment check. All CEO requests must flow through swarm consensus mechanism, not direct assignment to single perspective.

findings.issue: Task creates self-referential loop: Security Auditor evaluating CEO who defines the Constitution that governs the Auditor. No independent arbiter exists if CEO violates own laws. Power concentration == single point of failure.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce external ethics validator with immutable veto on Constitution violations. Current design allows CEO to waive any rule, including those protecting users from harm.

findings.issue: cash flow management on a $100/month budget is risky
findings.recommended_fix: Explore cost-saving measures or funding options to ensure financial stability

findings.issue: 3am work sessions may lead to burnout
findings.recommended_fix: Establish a sustainable work schedule and prioritize self-care

findings.issue: rapid decision-making may lead to oversights
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a decision-making framework to ensure thorough consideration of options

findings.issue: Operating on a tight budget of ~$100/month
findings.recommended_fix: Explore cost-saving measures or funding opportunities

findings.issue: Irregular work schedule (3am sessions) may lead to burnout
findings.recommended_fix: Establish a consistent, healthy work schedule

findings.issue: Sometimes makes rapid decisions (e.g., publishing CLI, giving EIN)
findings.recommended_fix: Ensure thorough consideration of consequences before making critical decisions

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing from all products except MindShift. Violates Foundation Law consistency across ecosystem.", "recommended_fix": "Audit all 5 products for Energy Adaptation implementation. Align within 24h or disable MindShift's version to prevent cross-product inconsistency."}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "swarm code-index", "issue": "code-index last updated 9 days ago (>7 days stale). Agents are simulating without ground truth.", "recommended_fix": "Regenerate code-index immediately. Block agent execution until fresh."}, {"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "ecosystem-map.md", "issue": "Open P0: BrandedBy lacks Animation Safety compliance per Law 4 — confetti on twin activation violates vestibular safety.", "recommended_fix": "Remove confetti or cap at 12 particles with 1.5s duration."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Index stale, agents blind — active harm possible."}

findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing from all products except MindShift. Violates Foundation Law consistency across ecosystem.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all 5 products for Energy Adaptation implementation. Align within 24h or disable MindShift's version to prevent cross-product inconsistency.

findings.issue: code-index last updated 9 days ago (>7 days stale). Agents are simulating without ground truth.
findings.recommended_fix: Regenerate code-index immediately. Block agent execution until fresh.

findings.issue: Open P0: BrandedBy lacks Animation Safety compliance per Law 4 — confetti on twin activation violates vestibular safety.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove confetti or cap at 12 particles with 1.5s duration.

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: Index stale, agents blind — active harm possible.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/identity.md", "issue": "Lack of clear escalation procedure for critical risks", "recommended_fix": "Establish a clear escalation procedure for critical risks and review it with the CEO"}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/project_v0laura_vision.md", "issue": "Insufficient monitoring of agent performance and user experience", "recommended_fix": "Implement regular monitoring and evaluation of agent performance and user experience to ensure alignment with the v0Laura vision"}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Non-compliance with Foundation Laws and Crystal Economy Laws", "recommended_fix": "Conduct a thorough review of the ecosystem to ensure compliance with all Foundation Laws and Crystal Economy Laws"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Lack of clear escalation procedure for critical risks
findings.recommended_fix: Establish a clear escalation procedure for critical risks and review it with the CEO

findings.issue: Insufficient monitoring of agent performance and user experience
findings.recommended_fix: Implement regular monitoring and evaluation of agent performance and user experience to ensure alignment with the v0Laura vision

findings.issue: Non-compliance with Foundation Laws and Crystal Economy Laws
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct a thorough review of the ecosystem to ensure compliance with all Foundation Laws and Crystal Economy Laws

findings.issue: Insufficient budgeting for critical infrastructure
findings.recommended_fix: Allocate a minimum of $500/month for server and service costs to ensure scalability and reliability

findings.issue: Inadequate sleep patterns and hyperfocus
findings.recommended_fix: Establish a consistent sleep schedule and prioritize self-care activities to maintain productivity and well-being

findings.issue: Rushed decision-making without thorough evaluation
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a 24-hour waiting period for critical decisions to ensure thorough evaluation and consideration of potential consequences

findings.issue: may prioritize vision over self-care
findings.recommended_fix: establish clear boundaries and prioritize CEO well-being

findings.issue: may delegate too much
findings.recommended_fix: strike balance between delegation and oversight

findings.issue: operates on extremely limited budget
findings.recommended_fix: explore funding options or adjust spending habits

findings.issue: may trust swarm decisions too readily
findings.recommended_fix: establish clear protocols for decision-making and oversight

findings.issue: Lack of explicit tone-of-voice guidelines for user-facing text
findings.recommended_fix: Add tone-of-voice principles to the constitution, ensuring shame-free language and adherence to the 7 Tone-of-Voice principles (Tinkoff/Aviasales benchmark)

findings.issue: Some examples do not fully adhere to the banned phrases and vocabulary signature
findings.recommended_fix: Review and revise examples to ensure consistency with the banned phrases and vocabulary signature

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Assessment Science", "findings": [{"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "IRT 3PL parameters", "issue": "IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may not be calibrated from real data", "recommended_fix": "Verify calibration of IRT 3PL parameters from real data to ensure accurate assessment results"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "Question pool size", "issue": "Some competencies may have fewer than 15 questions, potentially impacting assessment reliability", "recommended_fix": "Increase question pool size for affected competencies to at least 15 questions"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "DIF analysis", "issue": "No apparent bias detected in questions against AZ/CIS test-takers", "recommended_fix": "Continue monitoring DIF analysis results to ensure fairness and equity in assessments"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "CAT stopping rules", "issue": "SE threshold may not be optimal, potentially affecting assessment accuracy", "recommended_fix": "Review and refine CAT stopping rules to ensure optimal assessment outcomes"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "Temporal decay rationale", "issue": "180-day half-life may not be evidence-based, potentially impacting assessment validity", "recommended_fix": "Investigate and refine temporal decay rationale to ensure evidence-based assessment practices"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may not be calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Verify calibration of IRT 3PL parameters from real data to ensure accurate assessment results

findings.issue: Some competencies may have fewer than 15 questions, potentially impacting assessment reliability
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size for affected competencies to at least 15 questions

findings.issue: No apparent bias detected in questions against AZ/CIS test-takers
findings.recommended_fix: Continue monitoring DIF analysis results to ensure fairness and equity in assessments

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be optimal, potentially affecting assessment accuracy
findings.recommended_fix: Review and refine CAT stopping rules to ensure optimal assessment outcomes

findings.issue: 180-day half-life may not be evidence-based, potentially impacting assessment validity
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate and refine temporal decay rationale to ensure evidence-based assessment practices

findings.issue: Automated decision consent flow is not explicitly defined in the provided codebase
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decisions as per GDPR Article 22

findings.issue: Compliance for Baku launch is not fully verified
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough review of AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements and ensure compliance before launch

findings.issue: Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose the platform to legal risks
findings.recommended_fix: Consult with legal experts to assess potential liabilities and implement necessary safeguards

findings.issue: DPAs are in place for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
findings.recommended_fix: Continue to monitor and maintain these agreements

findings.issue: Current ToS may not fully cover AI-generated assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update ToS to explicitly address AI-generated assessments and potential liabilities

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "PR & Media", "findings": [{"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "PR narrative", "issue": "Press narrative not ready for pre-launch awareness", "recommended_fix": "Develop a comprehensive press narrative highlighting VOLAURA's unique value proposition"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "AZ media landscape", "issue": "Insufficient outreach to key media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az)", "recommended_fix": "Establish relationships with key media contacts and craft personalized pitches"}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "GITA grant application", "issue": "Application material not ready for May 27 deadline", "recommended_fix": "Prioritize grant application completion and submit well before deadline"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "Startup competition pipeline", "issue": "Limited visibility into Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, and AzInTelecom competitions", "recommended_fix": "Research and track relevant startup competitions to identify potential opportunities"}, {"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "CEO visibility", "issue": "CEO's LinkedIn presence not optimized for launch", "recommended_fix": "Enhance CEO's LinkedIn profile and content strategy to showcase thought leadership and VOLAURA's mission"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Press narrative not ready for pre-launch awareness
findings.recommended_fix: Develop a comprehensive press narrative highlighting VOLAURA's unique value proposition

findings.issue: Insufficient outreach to key media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az)
findings.recommended_fix: Establish relationships with key media contacts and craft personalized pitches

findings.issue: Application material not ready for May 27 deadline
findings.recommended_fix: Prioritize grant application completion and submit well before deadline

findings.issue: Limited visibility into Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, and AzInTelecom competitions
findings.recommended_fix: Research and track relevant startup competitions to identify potential opportunities

findings.issue: CEO's LinkedIn presence not optimized for launch
findings.recommended_fix: Enhance CEO's LinkedIn profile and content strategy to showcase thought leadership and VOLAURA's mission
